title: Uniform Grass Color
description: This mod makes it so all grass looks the same! Sometimes when you find the perfect building spot you just cannot build there because of how badly the mix of biomes is, but when installing this mod, it allows you to easily fix this!
body: This mod makes it so all grass looks the same! Sometimes when you find the perfect building spot you just cannot build there because of how badly the mix of biomes is, but when installing this mod, it allows you to easily fix this! It'll also modify similar things and is easily configurable using mods or just by hand!
